evidence: The paper uses RF and XGBoost impurity importance for feature selection, ranking the top 10 variables from each model and intersecting to identify 5 common variables. However, the main conclusions that "anti-MDA5 antibody and anti-Ro-52 antibody are vital risk factors" are primarily supported by univariate logistic regression (anti-MDA5 OR=9.17, P<0.001; anti-Ro-52 OR=5.27, P<0.001), which is independent of impurity-importance bias. The paper validates the reduced 5-variable models on a held-out test set and external validation cohort (AUC 0.909), providing predictive confirmation that the selected variables are appropriate.
